fault_hypothesis: The function on line 29 uses `int()` to truncate fractional shares, which causes the sum of the apportioned values to be less than the total when the discarded fractions sum to 1.0 or more.

spec.expr: sum([int(v) for v in shares__1]) == total

constraints.intent: The sum of the final integer shares must equal the original total.
The total value lost to truncation across all shares must be less than 1.0.

spec.expr: not any(v > int(v) for v in shares__1) or sum([int(v) for v in shares__1]) == total

constraints.intent: If any shares have fractional parts, the sum after truncation must still equal the total.
